Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.model.board

Interface BoardListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
BoardListenerAdapter, CombatController.HumanBoardListener, CombatController.MachineBoardListener
public interface BoardListener
Receives notifications about changes to a Board.

Applies the Observer behavioral pattern: Board (the subject) knows nothing about who is listening or how they react -- it just reports what happened. This is what keeps the model decoupled from the view/controller in the MVC architecture: the controller registers itself as a listener and updates the 3D scene in response, but Board never imports or depends on any JavaFX type.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onShipPlaced(Ship ship)
    Called right after a ship has been successfully placed on the board.
    void
    onShotResolved(Position position, ShotResult result, Ship ship)
    Called right after a shot has been resolved.

  • Method Details

    • onShipPlaced

      void onShipPlaced(Ship ship)
      Called right after a ship has been successfully placed on the board.
      Parameters:
      ship - the ship that was placed

    • onShotResolved

      void onShotResolved(Position position, ShotResult result, Ship ship)
      Called right after a shot has been resolved.
      Parameters:
      position - the cell that was shot at
      result - the outcome of the shot
      ship - the ship that was hit, or null if the result was ShotResult.WATER
